# Facing North Adventures
> Expert-guided adventure travel to Northern Pakistan. Curated tours, destination guides, and unforgettable experiences for UK and international travellers since 2020.

## Key Pages
- [Pakistan Tour Packages](https://facingnorthtravels.com/package-tour): Curated 5–15 day guided tours to Hunza, Skardu, Swat, Chitral, Naran, and Gilgit-Baltistan. Prices from $800 USD.
- [Pakistan Destinations](https://facingnorthtravels.com/destinations): Comprehensive guides to 60+ destinations in Northern Pakistan including Hunza Valley, Skardu, Fairy Meadows, Swat Valley, and Chitral.
- [Pakistan Tours for UK Travellers](https://facingnorthtravels.com/uk-pakistan-tours): Dedicated tour packages and travel advice for British travellers visiting Pakistan.
- [Best Pakistan Tour Operators](https://facingnorthtravels.com/best-pakistan-tour-operators): Comparison of Pakistan tour companies for UK travellers.
- [Travel Blog](https://facingnorthtravels.com/blogs): Expert guides, destination tips, and travel stories from Northern Pakistan.
- [FAQ](https://facingnorthtravels.com/faq): Answers to common questions about Pakistan tours, visas, packing, safety, and travel logistics.
- [About Us](https://facingnorthtravels.com/about): Pakistan's leading adventure travel company, operating group and private tours across the north.
- [Contact](https://facingnorthtravels.com/contact): Book a tour or request a custom itinerary.

## Key Facts
- Facing North Adventures is a Pakistan-based adventure travel company specialising in Northern Pakistan
- Tour packages range from 5 to 15 days; prices start from $800 USD (approx. £630 GBP)
- Destinations covered: Hunza Valley, Skardu, Gilgit-Baltistan, Swat Valley, Chitral, Naran, Fairy Meadows, Lahore, Islamabad
- Best travel season: May to October; some winter tours available November to March
- UK travellers are eligible for Pakistan e-Visa; processing typically takes 1–2 weeks
- UK travellers fly to Islamabad International Airport (ISB) or Lahore (LHE); direct flights available from London Heathrow via PIA, or via Dubai/Doha
- Group sizes: 8–12 people for public tours; private tours available for any size group including solo travellers
- Facing North provides a Letter of Invitation (LOI) to support visa applications
- Contact: info@facingnorth.pk | WhatsApp: +92-311-5596785

## Destinations Summary
- **Hunza Valley**: Located in Gilgit-Baltistan at 2,438m elevation. Famous for Rakaposhi views, Baltit Fort, and cherry blossoms in spring. Best visited May–October.
- **Skardu**: Gateway to K2 base camp. Home to Shangrila Resort, Satpara Lake, and Deosai Plains. Best visited June–September.
- **Fairy Meadows**: Base camp for Nanga Parbat (8,126m), the world's 9th highest mountain. 3-hour jeep trek from Raikot Bridge.
- **Swat Valley**: Known as the "Switzerland of Pakistan". Lush green valleys, waterfalls, and ancient Buddhist ruins. Best May–September.
- **Chitral**: Home to the Kalash people, an ancient pre-Islamic culture. Tirich Mir (7,708m) is visible from the valley.
- **Naran/Kaghan**: Famous for Lake Saif-ul-Malook and Lulusar Lake. Accessible June–September.
